Enterprise-Grade Monitoring for Kubernetes & Infrastructure

Real-time Kubernetes metrics, uptime monitoring, intelligent alerting, and instant notifications. Built for DevOps teams who need comprehensive visibility into their infrastructure.

View Helm ChartGo to AlertHawk

How It Works

See how AlertHawk monitors your infrastructure and keeps you informed

Website Monitoring

Monitor your websites and APIs with configurable intervals and instant alerts

Monitoring Example

www.google.com
Every 1 minute (configurable)

The application monitors the configured website every minute. According to the response code received, the system can send alerts to multiple channels.

Monitoring

Application 1
www.example1.com
Checking Status
Status: OK
Application 2
www.example2.com
Checking Status
Status: Failed
Sending Alert

Kubernetes Metrics Monitoring

Monitor your Kubernetes clusters with real-time CPU and RAM metrics

Cluster Agent

An agent installed on your Kubernetes cluster collects metrics from nodes and pods in selected namespaces.

Easy Cluster Connection

Connect any new cluster to send data to the AlertHawk Server with just a few clicks.

Fast ClickHouse Database

Metrics are stored in a fast ClickHouse database optimized for time-series data and fast queries.

Charts & Dashboards

Beautiful charts and dashboards provide real-time insights into your cluster performance.

Kubernetes Cluster

Nodes & Pods

CPU & RAM Metrics

AlertHawk Agent

Collects Metrics

Selected Namespaces

AlertHawk Server

ClickHouse Database

Fast Queries

Dashboards

Charts & Analytics

Real-time Insights

alerthawk-agent --collect-metrics
$Collecting metrics from cluster: production-k8s
$Namespace: default
[NODE] worker-node-1
CPU: 45.2% | RAM: 8.1GB / 16GB (50.6%)
CPU: 52.8% | RAM: 9.3GB / 16GB (58.1%)
[POD] app-frontend-7d8f9
CPU: 125m | RAM: 256MB / 512MB (50%)
[POD] app-backend-4k2j1
CPU: 340m | RAM: 512MB / 1GB (50%)
[NODE] worker-node-2
CPU: 38.7% | RAM: 7.2GB / 16GB (45%)
CPU: 41.3% | RAM: 7.8GB / 16GB (48.8%)
$Metrics sent to AlertHawk Server ✓

Kubernetes Infrastructure Monitoring

Deep visibility into your Kubernetes infrastructure with real-time CPU and RAM metrics, cluster health monitoring, and resource utilization tracking across nodes, pods, and namespaces.

Cluster-Level Metrics

Real-time CPU and memory monitoring across all nodes in your cluster. Track resource allocation, utilization trends, and capacity planning metrics.

Pod & Container Metrics

Granular CPU and RAM tracking at the pod and container level. Monitor resource consumption per namespace with detailed breakdowns and historical data.

Multi-Cluster Management

Centralized view of all your Kubernetes clusters. Monitor cluster health, resource status, and performance metrics across your entire infrastructure.

Cluster Metrics Dashboard

Monitor node CPU and memory usage across your cluster

Application Metrics Dashboard

Monitor pod and container CPU and memory usage across namespaces

Clusters Diagram

Supervisory view of all clusters and their status

FinOps for Azure Cloud

Fetch cost and usage metrics from Azure, explore detailed graphs, and use AI analysis to identify optimization opportunities across your cloud resources.

Azure Metrics Fetching

Connect your Azure subscription and pull cost and usage signals for subscriptions, resource groups, and services.

Detailed Graphs & Breakdowns

Understand spend and trends with interactive charts, period comparisons, and cost breakdowns by service type and resource group.

AI Analysis & Recommendations

Get AI-powered insights across cloud resources to highlight waste, underutilization, and actionable right-sizing opportunities.

Portfolio Overview

Track MTD cost, analyzed resources, and subscriptions in one place

Historical Results

Visualize daily/monthly cost trends over time

Cost Details

Break down spend by resource group and service type

AI Recommendations

Prioritized savings suggestions with an executive summary

Enterprise Monitoring Features

Comprehensive monitoring capabilities designed for modern infrastructure and Kubernetes environments

Kubernetes CPU & RAM Metrics

Real-time monitoring of CPU and memory usage across clusters, nodes, pods, and namespaces. Track resource consumption with detailed analytics and historical data.

Uptime Monitoring

Continuous uptime monitoring for websites, APIs, and services. Get instant alerts when downtime is detected with response time tracking and availability metrics.

Intelligent Alerting

Multi-channel alerting system with configurable thresholds. Receive notifications via email, SMS, Slack, Discord, and webhooks when issues are detected.

Real-time Notifications

Instant push notifications to mobile apps and web browsers. Never miss a critical alert with real-time updates on your infrastructure status.

Advanced Metrics & Analytics

Comprehensive metrics dashboard with customizable charts, historical data analysis, and performance trends. Monitor everything from cluster health to application performance.

Kubernetes Cluster Monitoring

Full visibility into your Kubernetes infrastructure. Monitor cluster-wide metrics, node health, pod status, namespace resource usage, and container-level performance.

Multi-endpoint Monitoring

Monitor websites, REST APIs, GraphQL endpoints, and TCP/UDP services. Track response times, status codes, and availability from multiple geographic locations.

Proactive Issue Detection

Advanced anomaly detection and threshold-based alerting. Identify performance degradation before it becomes a critical issue with predictive monitoring.

Mobile & Web Access

Native iOS and Android apps plus responsive web dashboard. Monitor your infrastructure from anywhere with real-time updates and push notifications.

Why Choose AlertHawk?

Enterprise-grade monitoring solution designed for DevOps teams and infrastructure engineers

Real-time Infrastructure Monitoring

Monitor Kubernetes clusters, applications, and endpoints with sub-second latency. Get instant visibility into CPU, RAM, and system health metrics.

Multi-Channel Alerting

Configure alerts via email, SMS, Slack, Discord, webhooks, and push notifications. Never miss a critical issue with intelligent alert routing.

Advanced Analytics & Metrics

Historical data analysis, trend detection, and performance insights. Track resource utilization patterns and optimize your infrastructure.

Self-Hosted & Private

Deploy on your own infrastructure with full data control. No vendor lock-in, complete privacy, and compliance with your security requirements.

Enterprise Scalability

Built to handle thousands of metrics and endpoints. Horizontally scalable architecture that grows with your infrastructure needs.

Low-Latency Notifications

Instant push notifications to mobile and web. Get alerted within seconds of an issue detection with real-time status updates.

Built with Modern Technology

Leveraging cutting-edge technologies for reliable, scalable, and performant infrastructure monitoring

Kubernetes Native

Built for Kubernetes with Helm chart deployment. Native integration with Kubernetes API for seamless cluster monitoring.

Time-Series Database

Efficient storage and querying of metrics data with optimized time-series database architecture for historical analysis.

Real-time Processing

Low-latency metric collection and processing engine for real-time monitoring and instant alert triggering.

Secure & Scalable

Enterprise-grade security with RBAC, encrypted communications, and horizontal scaling capabilities.

Kubernetes Deployment

Deploy AlertHawk on your Kubernetes cluster with our official Helm chart. Supports all major Kubernetes distributions and cloud providers.

View Helm Chart

Built with transparency in mind. View the source code, contribute, and customize AlertHawk to fit your specific monitoring needs.
